prompt: Traditional Chinese landscape painting in 山水 (shanshui) style depicting Moses calling to heaven and earth as witnesses. Show an ancient bearded figure in flowing robes standing on a mountain peak with arms raised toward dramatic clouds and celestial light. Below, flowing water represents the eternal covenant. Include traditional Chinese landscape elements: misty mountains, flowing rivers, ethereal clouds, and divine light breaking through. Style should be reminiscent of Song dynasty landscape paintings with ink wash technique, emphasizing the cosmic scope of the prophetic moment. Mystical and reverent atmosphere.
